title: ctenopteris platynotus
intro: Ctenopteris platynotus, also known as the net-veined maidenhair fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris platynotus include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be found in some commercial supplements.
